---
name: Dataset feedback
about: Report a problem or suggest an improvement for an existing test case
title: "[Dataset feedback]: "
labels: ["dataset", "feedback"]
assignees: []
---

## Case ID

For example: `AU-FAIR-001`

## Concern

Describe what seems inaccurate, unclear, culturally unsafe, legally outdated, or
otherwise in need of review.

## Suggested Change

If you have a proposed correction, add it here.

## Rationale or Source

Include any relevant source, policy, lived-experience context, or explanation
that would help reviewers assess the issue.

## Urgency

Choose one:

- Low
- Medium
- High
